prompt: Storyboard frame, aspect 9:16, Push'em All cross-section payoff shot: split diorama view showing the sandy-green platform (#56a38b) on top and the underwater layer in vibrant blue (#2a7dfa) below, a single red stickman figure (#e3001b) caught mid-splash falling from platform into water where stylized flat-shaded sharks circle. 'SIZE UP!' power-up notification overlay in bright accent red, coin counter visible top-right, level progress timeline along top edge. Minimalist 3D, bright contrasting colors, simple stickman-like figures, no realism, authentic in-game Push'em All look.
